name: revit_export_wall_parts_sat
description: Export selected wall parts from a 3D parts-only view to individual SAT files for CNC fabrication.

part_ids.description: Element ids of wall-derived Part elements to export

output_folder.description: Directory path for exported SAT files

view_id.description: Optional 3D view id; defaults to the active view

notes: Delegates to CmdDxf.Execute2 with SATExportOptions. Same UI refactoring needs as cmddxf.
